title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI tools to accelerate software development, with high-adoption teams now deploying daily and completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster than baseline. PayPal projects it could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 through expanded AI integration.
